channel.title: Lake Alfred, FL - News Flash
channel.description: Lake Alfred, FL - Get the latest news

item.title: 5K Fundraiser for Discovery Academy
item.description: The City of Lake Alfred and the Florida Association of City Clerks are partnering to support the BizTown Program at Discovery Academy. Each registration sponsors one student's participation in the BizTown Program.

item.title: April City Commission Meeting Dates
item.description: The City Commission meeting start at 7:00 PM in City Hall, 120 E. Pomelo Street on Monday, April 6, 2026 and Monday, April 20, 2026.
